message:
fix(tui,recipe): nil-guard dependency pointers and fix error handling logic

- Fix runTUIProgram error handling: the outer `errors.Is` check was
  redundant and incorrect (checked ErrProgramKilled then re-checked
  inside). Simplify to a single `if err != nil` with the Is checks
  inside, correctly returning nil for both kill and interrupt signals.

- Add nil guards for dependency pointers in applyRecipeFilters (two
  sites) and buildTreeRecursive to prevent nil pointer dereference
  when iterating issue dependencies that may contain nil entries.

- Update CHANGELOG.md with recent project history.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
